outline.title: Long A: -ai- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ai- words: mail, wait, train, rain. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Long A: -ay- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ay- words: day, pay, gray, crayon. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Long E: -ea- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ea- words: sea, meat, beach, seat. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Long E: -ee- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ee- words: feet, teeth, tree, green. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Can You Read These Words? Phonics Review!
outline.summary: Phonics review game slide with all 16 words from today's phonics lesson for students to practice reading.
